channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: 🔥 BTC finding footing? $65K support holds amid thinning sell pressure, but ETF outflows and weak spot volume mix a cautious recovery. https://Blockchain.News/news/bitcoin-65k-support-week-14-glassnode-analysis #Bitcoin #CryptoNews #MarketWatch

item.title: 🔥 Linea flips the script: idle bridged ETH is now staked via Lido V3 to fuel self-sustaining liquidity, no treasury dilution. https://Blockchain.News/news/linea-activates-yield-boost-bridged-eth-staking #crypto #DeFi #Lineacrypto
